assumptions.rewardItemFilter: product tags include 還元対象 + no-easy-points and item is contest entry
assumptions.earlyRule: orderedAt <= eventDate minus 1 month for all reward items in the order
assumptions.memberRankAvailability: resolved from /Users/takashiwada/Documents/CodeX/ShopifyApp/docs/shopify-member-rank-map.json when group tag or email matched
assumptions.provisionalPointsMeaning: points calculated from count/early only, excluding member-rank uplift
